1. http
  2. Client class

Client class

The abstract base class for an HTTP client.

A Client sends HTTP requests and receives HTTP responses. Every Client should be closed after use to release resources.

Do not use HttpClient directly; use this class instead.

abstract class Client

Constructors

Client()
Creates a new HTTP client.

Properties

userAgent ->String
The user-agent header sent with each request.

Methods

get(Uri url, {Map<String, String>? headers}) ->Future<Response>
Sends an HTTP GET request with the given headers to the given URL.
close() ->void
Closes the client and cleans up any resources associated with it.

Subclasses

See IOClient for a native implementation.

http 1.2.3
